case_title: SEBASTIAN THRUN VS. MONIQUE ZEILEN MEJIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SEBASTIAN THRUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONIQUE ZEILEAN MEJIA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS STEPHEN ADRY. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THRUN, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, MONIQUE ZEILEN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THRUN, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, MONIQUE ZEILEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CSAA INSURANCE GROUP, 3055 OAK RD, WALNUT CREEK HEARING DATE 7/2/21 @ 10AM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THRUN, SEBASTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEJIA, MONIQUE ZEILEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
